job_01.raw_text:
Senior Backend Engineer

We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to build scalable APIs and data pipelines.

Requirements:
- 5+ years of experience with Java or Kotlin
- Strong experience with REST APIs and microservices
- Experience with AWS (Lambda, SQS, DynamoDB)
- SQL and database design
- Collaborate with product and frontend teams

Nice to have: Kafka, event-driven architecture, Terraform.

job_02.raw_text:
Full Stack Developer

Join our team to build customer-facing web applications.

Must have:
- JavaScript/TypeScript and React
- Node.js or similar backend experience
- RESTful API design
- Git and CI/CD
- Strong communication skills

Responsibilities: Implement new features, code review, participate in sprint planning.

job_03.raw_text:
Data Engineer

Build and maintain data pipelines and warehouses.

Requirements:
- SQL and data modeling
- Experience with Spark or similar big data tools
- ETL design and implementation
- Cloud platforms (GCP or Azure)
- Work with analysts to define data needs

Preferred: dbt, Airflow, data quality tooling.

job_04.raw_text:
DevOps Engineer

We need a DevOps Engineer to own our infrastructure and deployment.

Must haves:
- Linux system administration
- Docker and Kubernetes
- CI/CD (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or similar)
- Terraform or Infrastructure as Code
- Monitoring and logging (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK)

You will: automate deployments, improve reliability, and support on-call rotation.

job_05.raw_text:
ML Engineer

Help us productionize machine learning models.

Requirements:
- Strong programming in Python
- ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, or scikit-learn)
- Experience deploying models (batch and real-time)
- SQL and data pipelines
- MLOps or model monitoring

Responsibilities: design experiments, collaborate with data scientists, optimize inference latency.
